text.title: data-pipeline-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for data-pipeline-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Python operators with external API calls that have no retry or timeout configuration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Network failures cause permanent task failure without retry. Uncapped retries without backoff hammer the API and trigger rate limiting.

failure-mode.description: Silently dropping records that fail schema validation or business rule checks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Silent drops make data quality failures invisible. The pipeline reports 100% success while data completeness degrades, which only surfaces when a report is wrong.
